555 ANTPLTLT_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD ANTPLTLT_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD High-Risk Drug (Indication): Antiplatelet (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was taking medication from the antiplatelet class and whether there was an indication noted for all medications in the drug class. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
^ = Blank
